tool_args.label: No Standing Zone Pilot at 125 Street

payload.description: No Standing Zone Pilot at 125 Street, near the conductors' booth, so that conductors can feel safe as they make announcements and survey the platform
Platform edge barrier pilot with railings at several stations in the system to monitor usage and protectiveness; aim is to limit track intrusions

tool_args.label: Security Monitor Screens Pilot on Buses

payload.description: Piloting security monitor screens on over 100 buses this year; high-definition LCD customer-facing screen streaming live video feeds from existing security camera infrastructure, deployed to routes with highest rates of assaults

payload.description: Cameras being deployed in every conductor cab; part of efforts improving frontline worker safety

payload.description: Upgrading lighting in every single subway station with brighter LED bulbs; 25% brighter than bulbs being replaced; makes it easier for cameras to get clear images

tool_args.label: Tremont Ave B D accessibility improvements

payload.project_name: Tremont Ave B D Accessibility Project
payload.description: Tremont Ave B D announced as fully accessible in February. Three new elevators placed into service, along with accessibility improvements at platforms and state of good repair work including stair upgrades. Marks the 149th ADA accessible subway station.
payload.location: Tremont Ave B D subway station

location_normalized.raw_text: Tremont Ave B D subway station

payload.description: New MTA App officially launches this week after extensive beta testing and customer feedback
National Transit Employee Appreciation Day; NYCT President Richard Davey spent the day in the field visiting NYCT team members

tool_args.label: First R211T open gangway cars hit the tracks

payload.description: First R211T open gangway cars hit the tracks with enhanced accessibility features including brighter lighting, large floor decals, yellow seats marking priority seating areas, and open-gangway design
Access-A-Ride began piloting OMNY contactless fare payment as an option for AAR customers

tool_args.label: Tremont Ave B D Station Announced Fully Accessible

payload.description: Tremont Ave B D announced as fully accessible; three new elevators placed into service; marks the 149th ADA accessible subway station
February 13 snowstorm posed challenges in bus operations; snowiest day after more than 700 days without measurable snowfall
Bollards installed around the conductor cab on both platforms at 125-Lexington Avenue 4 5 6 as part of the No Standing Pilot

tool_args.label: Platform barriers at Morgan Av L and 5th Ave 7

payload.description: Platform barriers installed to improve safety for customers and employees, completed at Morgan Av L and 5th Ave 7

tool_args.label: Detectable Warning Strips on subway platforms

payload.description: Multi-year project to install yellow detectable warning strips (DWS) on the edges of more than 50 subway platforms over the past two years

payload.claim_text: Paratransit now consistently exceeds pre-pandemic levels, making it the first department at the MTA to reach this milestone
payload.subject: Access-A-Ride Paratransit

tool_args.label: Top quality of life issues in February 2024 Pulse Survey

payload.claim_text: Quality of life issues remain prevalent to customers as people experiencing homelessness, as well as people behaving erratically, are the most mentioned improvement items in February
payload.subject: subway customers

tool_args.label: Detectable Warning Strips goal through Capital program

payload.claim_text: We appreciate the partnership with Department of Subways and will continue toward our goal of having DWS at every station platform through our Capital program
payload.subject: Detectable Warning Strips at subway platforms
